material.tconstruct.blazing_bone.magic: Doubles spell damage while on fire.
material.tconstruct.bone.magic: Spell damage ignores part of the target's armor.
material.tconstruct.chorus.magic: Teleporting via spell grants the Evasion effect.
material.tconstruct.dragon_scale.magic: Increases spell power by 10% while airborne.
material.tconstruct.earthslime.magic: Increases nature spell power by 5% and evocation spell resistance by 15%.
material.tconstruct.enderslime.magic: Increases ender spell power by 5% and lightning spell resistance by 15%.
material.tconstruct.glowstone.magic: Increases holy spell power by 5% and blood spell resistance by 15%.
material.tconstruct.ichor.magic: Increases blood spell power by 5% and holy spell resistance by 15%.
material.tconstruct.ichorskin.magic: Increases spell power by 15%, but reduces mana regeneration by 30%.
material.tconstruct.leaves.magic: Boosts mana regeneration in sunlight, up to 15%.
material.tconstruct.nahuatl.magic: Spell damage has a 50% chance to apply bleeding.
material.tconstruct.necrotic_bone.magic: Restores health after dealing enough spell damage.
material.tconstruct.quartz.magic: Increases fire spell power by 5% and ice spell resistance by 15%.
material.tconstruct.rose_gold.magic: Usable as spellbook pages, but grants no extra magic trait.
material.tconstruct.skyslime.magic: Increases lightning spell power by 5% and ender spell resistance by 15%.
material.tconstruct.venombone.magic: Increases spell damage against poisoned targets.
